dialogue.speaker: KAELIN
dialogue.line: "Aria, I need you to dig up everything on the Ryker case."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAELIN, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ARIA
dialogue.line: "Already on it, Kaelin. I've got a few leads, but they're going to take time."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ARIA, her brow furrowed in concentration.

dialogue.speaker: KAELIN
dialogue.line: "We don't have time. Ryker's family is getting antsy, and I need something concrete to give them."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of KAELIN, his jaw clenched in frustration.

dialogue.speaker: ARIA
dialogue.line: "Vex, I need you to find out what Ryker was working on before he disappeared."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ARIA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VEX
dialogue.line: "Aria, I've got something. Ryker was involved in a secret project with the Oni-Kiru corporation. Meet me at the Black Hole bar at midnight to discuss further."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ARIA, her earpiece held to her ear, a hint of concentration on her face.

dialogue.speaker: ARIA
dialogue.line: "What do you know about Oni-Kiru's project?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ARIA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VEX
dialogue.line: "I know it's big, Aria. And I think Ryker was in over his head. Meet me outside, I've got something to show you."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of VEX, his face inches from Aria's, his eyes locked on hers with an air of intensity.
